title: Haganai: I Don't Have Many Friends
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 'Haganai' (2011, 12 eps) + S2 'Haganai NEXT' (2013, eps 13-24) = 24 total; anilistAnimeId 10719 is the S1 TV anime. The franchise's true source is Yomi Hirasaka's LIGHT NOVEL (11 vols, 2009-2015), which the anime adapts directly. anilistMangaId 49087 is Itachi's manga adaptation (FINISHED, 109 ch / 20 vols, 2010-2021) -- an independent, parallel adaptation of the same LN, so its pacing and chapter boundaries do not line up exactly with the anime, and the manga's ending diverges from the LN. Season 1 adapts LN vol 1 through vol 4 ch 2; Season 2 NEXT adapts LN vol 4 through about three-quarters of vol 8. In manga terms, the two seasons together cover roughly chapters 1-64; the documented manga resume point after the anime is Vol 15, ch 65 (manga vol anchors: v1=ch1-5, v2=ch6-10, v3=ch11-15, v4=ch16-20, v5=ch21-24). The intra-anime S1/S2 chapter split (~ch 32) is approximate. No theatrical films.

mappings.arc: Season 1: Neighbors Club Formation & First Summer (through Yozora 'Sora' reveal)
mappings.note: Adapts LN vol 1 to vol 4 ch 2. Manga chapter split is approximate.

mappings.arc: Season 2 (NEXT): Sena Engagement, Yukimura's Secret & Mayoi Neko Overheat Film
mappings.note: Adapts LN vol 4 to ~vol 8 (3/4). Manga chapter split is approximate.
LN vol 8 (~3/4) onward through vol 11. Manga ending diverges from the LN.
